text.message: What did you want him to do bro
is it too early to say we need to play together?
ows player with entire centre to take
I blocked the other two already. I could only solo you
not if we try to stop him
he would have to 4:1 with the bank or rob us
and he gets the perfect dev
gosh and he gets the best one
we keep blocking either of the 2
Black bout to have the brick port and all 5 resources
after a point, we will get to black
early game lead to Oj hurts all of us
and the sheep is blocked, can I get a future sheep blue?
orange so worried about black he blocks me haha
Oj - Didn't you say black is dangerous?
I think Oj is a pretty good player, he knows he is likely to win
You somehow got a city so yeah blue you’re winning
Why not blue. You see what happens when he gets that wood port?
we need to block 6 sheep before oj starts his pops
if he gets a robber, it could be over soon
i think black could be aheaad of orange now though possibly
after a point, we will have to get to black
Oj - you should definitely target black
orange is scared to get plowed
Why are you so pro blue?
i wasn't going to plow but u keep solo me makes me want to
only till he gets his port
then I would have to think basis rolls
lol you were definitely always going to plow
And blue my only way to block you is solo. We went over this.
I think we should now be ready for the pops
with orange trying to block me all game
I asked you for the insurance
you have put up a trade
i gave u the opiton above
did not think I would be that unlucky at first
i put up another request and you rejected it
anyway, 6 grain and rob black now I think
Eff that thought it was for brick
orange, u were too hyper on me
6 roads is what we need blue
Would be way easier to help me take riad
entire game, orange, why focus on me
if it is a mono, then brick or wood from black is the way, Oj
GD I wanted to trade for a wheat.
any ore or sheep with you blue?
Yeah why’d you take it off the 8
black - you can help as well
Oj with army is worst for you
flip why take it off the 8
Remember when red moved it off his 8
because I had to pace the army
Then said someone else blew the game?
blue - you are making a mistake
Red if you got VPs you’d be at 8 with army too
i traded u sheep so many times
if you were going to extend to 11 roads then black may not take road.. (with my plow on 4 grain)
Oj will be fast to 2 points
i like how if orange plows me, black instantly wins haha
he will just settle the 3:1 port
red how do you plow black
Black is prolly not even going for road. Just needs a city at this point
10 cards should take you to 8 or 9 as well
lol I drew a road builder
